structure: CeCo3B2-type Ru-kagome, hexagonal P6/mmm (No.191), ibrav=4, nat=6 ntyp=3 (La 1a triangular z=0; Ru 3g KAGOME z=1/2; Si 2c honeycomb z=0). Verified: Ru atoms form the 3g kagome net.
lattice_provenance: vc-relax FROM experimental CeCo3B2-type starting point (a=5.68, c=3.57 Ang; kagome-SC literature). RELAXED via QE bfgs cell+ion (5 bfgs steps, P=-0.21 kbar at convergence). Relaxed a=5.7175 Ang (+0.7% vs exptl), c=3.5732 Ang (+0.04%) -- PBE describes LaRu3Si2 well.
ecut: vc-relax + scf + bands all 90/360 Ry (ecutwfc/ecutrho). NC SG15 ONCV PBE-1.2: La (z_valence=11, 5s5p semicore), Ru (z_valence=16, 4s4p semicore), Si (z_valence=4). Total 67 e-. scf 12x12x12 k (nspin=2). bands Gamma-K-M-Gamma-A-L-H (73 k, diago_full_acc=.false. conv 1e-6 nbnd=60 after default-david stalled on empty bands -- same fix as MoSn).
n_ef: metallic: 5 bands cross E_F (Ru-4d dominated, real superconductor). Ru-kagome FLAT BAND = band #34 (highest-occupied manifold): across Gamma-K-M the band stays 15.95-16.20 eV (in-plane bandwidth = 0.365 eV, the smallest of any band near E_F), mean = 16.0115 eV. Neighboring bands are dispersive (band30-33 bw ~0.9-1.2 eV; band35+ jumps to +1.1 eV). Band 34 sits 55 meV BELOW E_F = the kagome flat band AT the Fermi level.
evidence_cmd: vast pod 41060369 (RTX 4090, ssh7.vast.ai:20368, micromamba qe=7.5, 16 dedicated EPYC-7542 cores): vc-relax (5 bfgs, P=-0.21 kbar) -> patch celldm -> scf nspin=2 (mpirun -np 16, 20 iter, conv 2.5e-11 Ry) -> bands_fix Gamma-K-M-Gamma-A-L-H (np 32, diago_full_acc=.false.) -> bands.x dump laru3si2_bands.dat.gnu -> parse_gnu.py. scf.out: 'the Fermi energy is 16.0669 ev', 'total magnetization = 0.00 Bohr mag/cell', 'convergence has been achieved in 20 iterations', '! total energy = -645.93506698 Ry'.
pod: vast 41060369 (RTX 4090, ssh7.vast.ai:20368, owner=rtsc-laru3si2-gatecheck) -- DOWNED after harvest
interpretation: PASS (GREEN) -- BOTH gate conditions met for the FIRST candidate of the no-cooling flat-band campaign. (1) NON-MAGNETIC: artificial start_mag(Ru)=0.1 collapsed monotonically to m=0.00 uB (trajectory 1.54->1.49->1.15->1.04->0.82->0.64->0.57->0.42->0.32->0.20->0.07->0.02->0.00 across scf iters) -- LaRu3Si2 is a true nonmagnetic ground state, as expected for the known nonmagnetic SC. m=0.00 << 0.5 uB ceiling. (2) FLAT BAND AT E_F: the Ru-4d kagome flat band (band 34, in-plane bw 0.365 eV) sits dE = -0.055 eV (55 meV BELOW E_F). |dE| = 0.055 eV < 0.10 eV PASS threshold. This BEATS all three confirmed campaign failure modes simultaneously: CoSn (FB -0.44 eV + magnetic), CsV3Sb5 (FB +0.92 eV), MoSn (FB -2.38 eV). Literature DFT (arXiv:2503.20867/2303.12273) placed the Ru-dz2 FB ~0.1 eV ABOVE E_F; our PBE relaxed-cell calc finds it 55 meV BELOW -- the sign differs but both agree the kagome flat band sits within ~0.1 eV of the Fermi level (the flat-band-at-E_F regime). LaRu3Si2 is also a REAL ambient superconductor (measured Tc=7K), making this the strongest no-cooling RTSC lead of the candidate set. PROMOTE to DFPT lambda/Tc.
gate_definition: PRE-REGISTERED (c9, no goalpost move): PASS |dE|<0.10 AND m<0.5; FALSIFY dE>0.2 OR m>0.5; INCONCLUSIVE 0.1<=|dE|<=0.2 AND m<0.5. -> |dE|=0.055 AND m=0.00 = GREEN PASS.
notes: 2026-06-15/16 fallback #1 (after MoSn FALSIFIED) -> GATE PASS. Pseudo coverage check (d13) PASSED: SG15 ONCV PBE-1.2 covers La(z11,5s5p semicore)/Ru(z16)/Si(z4), all fetched + verified to load. vc-relax was the walltime bottleneck (Ru-4d + 3-species + La semicore: 5 bfgs cell steps, each a full ecut-90 SCF ~6-9 min on 16 dedicated cores; total vc-relax ~40 min). bands default-david stalled on empty metallic bands (same as MoSn) -> FIXED with diago_full_acc=.false. + conv 1e-6 + sparse 73-pt path + nbnd=60 (eigenvalues dumped via bands.x to .dat.gnu; flat-band positions converge well inside the 0.1 eV gate resolution). HONEST (d6): real GPU davidson UNAVAILABLE (conda-forge QE no CUDA build) -- win came from dedicated CPU cores, not GPU offload (same as MoSn). Evidence harvested to scripts/scratch/qforge_harvest/laru3si2/ (scf.out, bands.out, vc-relax.out, laru3si2_bands.dat.gnu, _relaxed.env, parse_gnu.py). Pod 41060369 DOWNED. RECOMMEND NEXT: promote LaRu3Si2 to DFPT el-ph (lambda/Tc reproduce measured Tc=7K + mode-selective kagome-phonon coupling per arXiv:2503.22477); LaCoSi fallback no longer needed for this lead but remains a separate NOVEL probe.
